name: player_segment
description: 玩家分群行为分析模板：付费玩家付费点、玩法参与、沉默玩家现状、免费玩家行为、Top 明细
summary_template: 【玩家分群分析】游戏 {game_id}，分析窗口 {analysis_start}~{analysis_end}，沉默窗口 {silent_start}~{silent_end}

overview.name: 概览
overview.sql:
WITH active AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT role_id
  FROM gamelog_raw.v_presto_log_rolelogin
  WHERE game_id = 312
    AND ds BETWEEN '{analysis_start}' AND '{analysis_end}'
    {server_filter}
),
paid AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT role_id
  FROM gamelog_raw.v_presto_log_payrecharge
  WHERE game_id = 312
    AND ds BETWEEN '{analysis_start}' AND '{analysis_end}'
    {server_filter}
),
silent AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT role_id
  FROM gamelog_raw.v_presto_log_payrecharge
  WHERE game_id = 312
    AND ds BETWEEN '{silent_start}' AND '{silent_end}'
    {server_filter}
),
pay_analysis AS (
  SELECT role_id,
         SUM(CAST(pay_money AS DOUBLE)) AS pay_amount,
         COUNT(*) AS pay_times
  FROM gamelog_raw.v_presto_log_payrecharge
  WHERE game_id = 312
    AND ds BETWEEN '{analysis_start}' AND '{analysis_end}'
    {server_filter}
  GROUP BY role_id
)
SELECT
  CASE
    WHEN p.role_id IS NOT NULL THEN '付费玩家'
    WHEN s.role_id IS NOT NULL THEN '沉默玩家'
    ELSE '免费玩家'
  END AS segment,
  COUNT(DISTINCT a.role_id) AS user_count,
  COUNT(DISTINCT pa.role_id) AS payer_count,
  COALESCE(CAST(SUM(pa.pay_amount) AS DECIMAL(18,2)), 0) AS pay_amount,
  COALESCE(SUM(pa.pay_times), 0) AS pay_times,
  CASE WHEN COUNT(DISTINCT a.role_id) > 0
       THEN ROUND(COALESCE(CAST(SUM(pa.pay_amount) AS DOUBLE), 0) / COUNT(DISTINCT a.role_id), 2)
       ELSE 0 END AS arpu,
  CASE WHEN COUNT(DISTINCT pa.role_id) > 0
       THEN ROUND(COALESCE(CAST(SUM(pa.pay_amount) AS DOUBLE), 0) / COUNT(DISTINCT pa.role_id), 2)
       ELSE 0 END AS arppu
FROM active a
LEFT JOIN paid p ON a.role_id = p.role_id
LEFT JOIN silent s ON a.role_id = s.role_id
LEFT JOIN pay_analysis pa ON a.role_id = pa.role_id
GROUP BY CASE
    WHEN p.role_id IS NOT NULL THEN '付费玩家'
    WHEN s.role_id IS NOT NULL THEN '沉默玩家'
    ELSE '免费玩家'
  END
ORDER BY CASE segment WHEN '付费玩家' THEN 1 WHEN '沉默玩家' THEN 2 WHEN '免费玩家' THEN 3 ELSE 4 END

columns.avg_diamonds_per_payer: 付费用户人均充值钻石

paid_recharge.name: 付费玩家付费点
paid_recharge.sql:
SELECT
  pay_itemid AS item_id,
  pay_type AS pay_type_name,
  COUNT(DISTINCT role_id) AS payer_count,
  COUNT(*) AS pay_times,
  ROUND(SUM(CAST(pay_money AS DOUBLE)), 2) AS pay_amount,
  ROUND(SUM(CAST(pay_money AS DOUBLE)) / COUNT(*), 2) AS avg_price
FROM gamelog_raw.v_presto_log_payrecharge
WHERE game_id = {game_id}
  AND ds BETWEEN '{analysis_start}' AND '{analysis_end}'
  {server_filter}
GROUP BY pay_itemid, pay_type
ORDER BY pay_amount DESC
LIMIT 50

columns.avg_diamonds_per_payer: 付费用户人均充值钻石

paid_engagement.name: 付费玩家玩法参与
paid_engagement.sql:
WITH paid AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT role_id
  FROM gamelog_raw.v_presto_log_payrecharge
  WHERE game_id = {game_id}
    AND ds BETWEEN '{analysis_start}' AND '{analysis_end}'
    {server_filter}
),
behavior AS (
  SELECT b_type, role_id
  FROM gamelog_raw.v_presto_log_bhbehavior
  WHERE game_id = {game_id}
    AND ds BETWEEN '{analysis_start}' AND '{analysis_end}'
    {server_filter}
)
SELECT
  b.b_type AS module_id,
  COUNT(DISTINCT b.role_id) AS active_users,
  COUNT(*) AS active_events,
  ROUND(CAST(COUNT(*) AS DOUBLE) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT b.role_id), 0), 1) AS active_avg,
  COUNT(DISTINCT p.role_id) AS paid_users,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE p.role_id IS NOT NULL) AS paid_events,
  ROUND(CAST(COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE p.role_id IS NOT NULL) AS DOUBLE) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT p.role_id), 0), 1) AS paid_avg,
  ROUND(CAST(COUNT(DISTINCT p.role_id) AS DOUBLE) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT b.role_id), 0) * 100, 2) AS paid_rate
FROM behavior b
LEFT JOIN paid p ON b.role_id = p.role_id
GROUP BY b.b_type
ORDER BY active_events DESC
LIMIT 50

columns.avg_diamonds_per_payer: 付费用户人均充值钻石

silent_behavior.name: 沉默玩家现状
silent_behavior.sql:
WITH paid AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT role_id
  FROM gamelog_raw.v_presto_log_payrecharge
  WHERE game_id = {game_id}
    AND ds BETWEEN '{analysis_start}' AND '{analysis_end}'
    {server_filter}
),
silent AS (
  SELECT role_id, MAX(ds) AS last_pay_ds, SUM(CAST(pay_money AS DOUBLE)) AS silent_pay_amount, COUNT(*) AS silent_pay_times
  FROM gamelog_raw.v_presto_log_payrecharge
  WHERE game_id = {game_id}
    AND ds BETWEEN '{silent_start}' AND '{silent_end}'
    {server_filter}
  GROUP BY role_id
),
silent_active AS (
  SELECT s.role_id,
         s.silent_pay_amount
  FROM silent s
  LEFT JOIN paid p ON s.role_id = p.role_id
  WHERE p.role_id IS NULL
),
behavior AS (
  SELECT b_type, role_id
  FROM gamelog_raw.v_presto_log_bhbehavior
  WHERE game_id = {game_id}
    AND ds BETWEEN '{analysis_start}' AND '{analysis_end}'
    {server_filter}
)
SELECT
  b.b_type AS module_id,
  COUNT(DISTINCT sa.role_id) AS silent_users,
  COUNT(b.role_id) AS total_events,
  ROUND(CAST(COUNT(b.role_id) AS DOUBLE) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT sa.role_id), 0), 1) AS avg_per_user,
  ROUND(CAST(COUNT(DISTINCT sa.role_id) AS DOUBLE) / NULLIF((SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT role_id) FROM silent_active), 0) * 100, 2) AS participation_rate,
  COALESCE(CAST(AVG(sa.silent_pay_amount) AS DECIMAL(18,2)), 0) AS avg_silent_pay
FROM silent_active sa
LEFT JOIN behavior b ON sa.role_id = b.role_id
GROUP BY b.b_type
ORDER BY silent_users DESC NULLS LAST
LIMIT 50

columns.avg_diamonds_per_payer: 付费用户人均充值钻石

free_behavior.name: 免费玩家行为
free_behavior.sql:
WITH paid AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT role_id
  FROM gamelog_raw.v_presto_log_payrecharge
  WHERE game_id = {game_id}
    AND ds BETWEEN '{analysis_start}' AND '{analysis_end}'
    {server_filter}
),
silent AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT role_id
  FROM gamelog_raw.v_presto_log_payrecharge
  WHERE game_id = {game_id}
    AND ds BETWEEN '{silent_start}' AND '{silent_end}'
    {server_filter}
),
active AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT role_id
  FROM gamelog_raw.v_presto_log_rolelogin
  WHERE game_id = {game_id}
    AND ds BETWEEN '{analysis_start}' AND '{analysis_end}'
    {server_filter}
),
login_info AS (
  SELECT role_id,
         max_by(role_paid, ds) AS role_paid,
         max_by(role_level, ds) AS role_level,
         max_by(role_vip, ds) AS role_vip
  FROM gamelog_raw.v_presto_log_rolelogin
  WHERE game_id = {game_id}
    AND ds BETWEEN '{analysis_start}' AND '{analysis_end}'
    {server_filter}
  GROUP BY role_id
),
free_roles AS (
  SELECT a.role_id
  FROM active a
  LEFT JOIN paid p ON a.role_id = p.role_id
  LEFT JOIN silent s ON a.role_id = s.role_id
  LEFT JOIN login_info li ON a.role_id = li.role_id
  WHERE p.role_id IS NULL AND s.role_id IS NULL
    AND (li.role_paid = 0 OR li.role_id IS NULL)
),
behavior AS (
  SELECT b_type, role_id
  FROM gamelog_raw.v_presto_log_bhbehavior
  WHERE game_id = {game_id}
    AND ds BETWEEN '{analysis_start}' AND '{analysis_end}'
    {server_filter}
),
login_days AS (
  SELECT role_id, COUNT(DISTINCT ds) AS active_days
  FROM gamelog_raw.v_presto_log_rolelogin
  WHERE game_id = {game_id}
    AND ds BETWEEN '{analysis_start}' AND '{analysis_end}'
    {server_filter}
    AND role_id IN (SELECT role_id FROM free_roles)
  GROUP BY role_id
)
SELECT
  b.b_type AS module_id,
  COUNT(DISTINCT fr.role_id) AS users,
  COUNT(b.role_id) AS total_events,
  ROUND(CAST(COUNT(b.role_id) AS DOUBLE) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT fr.role_id), 0), 1) AS avg_per_user,
  ROUND(CAST(COUNT(DISTINCT fr.role_id) AS DOUBLE) / NULLIF((SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT role_id) FROM free_roles), 0) * 100, 2) AS participation_rate,
  COALESCE(CAST(AVG(ld.active_days) AS DECIMAL(18,1)), 0) AS avg_active_days,
  COALESCE(CAST(AVG(li.role_level) AS DECIMAL(18,0)), 0) AS avg_level,
  COALESCE(CAST(AVG(li.role_vip) AS DECIMAL(18,0)), 0) AS avg_vip
FROM free_roles fr
LEFT JOIN behavior b ON fr.role_id = b.role_id
LEFT JOIN login_days ld ON fr.role_id = ld.role_id
LEFT JOIN login_info li ON fr.role_id = li.role_id
GROUP BY b.b_type
ORDER BY users DESC NULLS LAST
LIMIT 50

columns.avg_diamonds_per_payer: 付费用户人均充值钻石

top_detail.name: Top明细
top_detail.sql:
WITH paid AS (
  SELECT role_id, SUM(CAST(pay_money AS DOUBLE)) AS pay_amount, COUNT(*) AS pay_times
  FROM gamelog_raw.v_presto_log_payrecharge
  WHERE game_id = {game_id}
    AND ds BETWEEN '{analysis_start}' AND '{analysis_end}'
    {server_filter}
  GROUP BY role_id
),
silent AS (
  SELECT role_id, SUM(CAST(pay_money AS DOUBLE)) AS silent_pay_amount, COUNT(*) AS silent_pay_times, MAX(ds) AS last_pay_ds
  FROM gamelog_raw.v_presto_log_payrecharge
  WHERE game_id = {game_id}
    AND ds BETWEEN '{silent_start}' AND '{silent_end}'
    {server_filter}
  GROUP BY role_id
),
login_info AS (
  SELECT role_id,
         max_by(role_level, ds) AS role_level,
         max_by(role_vip, ds) AS role_vip
  FROM gamelog_raw.v_presto_log_rolelogin
  WHERE game_id = {game_id}
    AND ds BETWEEN '{analysis_start}' AND '{analysis_end}'
    {server_filter}
  GROUP BY role_id
),
login_days AS (
  SELECT role_id, COUNT(DISTINCT ds) AS active_days
  FROM gamelog_raw.v_presto_log_rolelogin
  WHERE game_id = {game_id}
    AND ds BETWEEN '{analysis_start}' AND '{analysis_end}'
    {server_filter}
  GROUP BY role_id
),
paid_top AS (
  SELECT '付费玩家' AS segment, CAST(p.role_id AS VARCHAR) AS role_id,
         li.role_level, li.role_vip,
         COALESCE(CAST(p.pay_amount AS DECIMAL(18,2)), 0) AS window_pay_amount,
         p.pay_times,
         ld.active_days,
         ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY p.pay_amount DESC) AS rk
  FROM paid p
  LEFT JOIN login_info li ON p.role_id = li.role_id
  LEFT JOIN login_days ld ON p.role_id = ld.role_id
),
silent_top AS (
  SELECT '沉默玩家' AS segment, CAST(s.role_id AS VARCHAR) AS role_id,
         li.role_level, li.role_vip,
         COALESCE(CAST(s.silent_pay_amount AS DECIMAL(18,2)), 0) AS window_pay_amount,
         s.silent_pay_times AS pay_times,
         ld.active_days,
         ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY s.silent_pay_amount DESC, s.last_pay_ds ASC) AS rk
  FROM silent s
  LEFT JOIN paid p ON s.role_id = p.role_id
  LEFT JOIN login_info li ON s.role_id = li.role_id
  LEFT JOIN login_days ld ON s.role_id = ld.role_id
  WHERE p.role_id IS NULL
),
free_top AS (
  SELECT '免费玩家' AS segment, CAST(fr.role_id AS VARCHAR) AS role_id,
         li.role_level, li.role_vip,
         0 AS window_pay_amount,
         0 AS pay_times,
         ld.active_days,
         ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY ld.active_days DESC, li.role_level DESC NULLS LAST) AS rk
  FROM (
    SELECT DISTINCT role_id
    FROM gamelog_raw.v_presto_log_rolelogin
    WHERE game_id = {game_id}
      AND ds BETWEEN '{analysis_start}' AND '{analysis_end}'
      {server_filter}
  ) fr
  LEFT JOIN paid p ON fr.role_id = p.role_id
  LEFT JOIN silent s ON fr.role_id = s.role_id
  LEFT JOIN login_info li ON fr.role_id = li.role_id
  LEFT JOIN login_days ld ON fr.role_id = ld.role_id
  WHERE p.role_id IS NULL AND s.role_id IS NULL
)
SELECT segment, role_id, role_level, role_vip, window_pay_amount, pay_times, active_days
FROM paid_top WHERE rk <= {top_n}
UNION ALL
SELECT segment, role_id, role_level, role_vip, window_pay_amount, pay_times, active_days
FROM silent_top WHERE rk <= {top_n}
UNION ALL
SELECT segment, role_id, role_level, role_vip, window_pay_amount, pay_times, active_days
FROM free_top WHERE rk <= {top_n}
ORDER BY segment, window_pay_amount DESC

overview.name: 概览
overview.sql:
WITH active AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT role_id
  FROM gamelog_raw.v_presto_log_rolelogin
  WHERE game_id = {game_id}
    AND ds BETWEEN '{analysis_start}' AND '{analysis_end}'
    {server_filter}
),
paid AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT role_id
  FROM gamelog_raw.v_presto_log_payrecharge
  WHERE game_id = {game_id}
    AND ds BETWEEN '{analysis_start}' AND '{analysis_end}'
    {server_filter}
),
silent AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT role_id
  FROM gamelog_raw.v_presto_log_payrecharge
  WHERE game_id = {game_id}
    AND ds BETWEEN '{silent_start}' AND '{silent_end}'
    {server_filter}
),
pay_analysis AS (
  SELECT role_id,
         SUM(CAST(pay_money AS DOUBLE)) AS pay_amount,
         COUNT(*) AS pay_times
  FROM gamelog_raw.v_presto_log_payrecharge
  WHERE game_id = {game_id}
    AND ds BETWEEN '{analysis_start}' AND '{analysis_end}'
    {server_filter}
  GROUP BY role_id
)
SELECT
  CASE
    WHEN p.role_id IS NOT NULL THEN '付费玩家'
    WHEN s.role_id IS NOT NULL THEN '沉默玩家'
    ELSE '免费玩家'
  END AS segment,
  COUNT(DISTINCT a.role_id) AS user_count,
  COUNT(DISTINCT pa.role_id) AS payer_count,
  COALESCE(CAST(SUM(pa.pay_amount) AS DECIMAL(18,2)), 0) AS pay_amount,
  COALESCE(SUM(pa.pay_times), 0) AS pay_times,
  CASE WHEN COUNT(DISTINCT a.role_id) > 0
       THEN ROUND(COALESCE(CAST(SUM(pa.pay_amount) AS DOUBLE), 0) / COUNT(DISTINCT a.role_id), 2)
       ELSE 0 END AS arpu,
  CASE WHEN COUNT(DISTINCT pa.role_id) > 0
       THEN ROUND(COALESCE(CAST(SUM(pa.pay_amount) AS DOUBLE), 0) / COUNT(DISTINCT pa.role_id), 2)
       ELSE 0 END AS arppu
FROM active a
LEFT JOIN paid p ON a.role_id = p.role_id
LEFT JOIN silent s ON a.role_id = s.role_id
LEFT JOIN pay_analysis pa ON a.role_id = pa.role_id
GROUP BY CASE
    WHEN p.role_id IS NOT NULL THEN '付费玩家'
    WHEN s.role_id IS NOT NULL THEN '沉默玩家'
    ELSE '免费玩家'
  END
ORDER BY CASE segment WHEN '付费玩家' THEN 1 WHEN '沉默玩家' THEN 2 WHEN '免费玩家' THEN 3 ELSE 4 END

paid_recharge.name: 付费玩家付费点
paid_recharge.sql:
SELECT
  pay_itemid AS item_id,
  pay_type AS pay_type_name,
  COUNT(DISTINCT role_id) AS payer_count,
  COUNT(*) AS pay_times,
  ROUND(SUM(CAST(pay_money AS DOUBLE)), 2) AS pay_amount,
  ROUND(SUM(CAST(pay_money AS DOUBLE)) / COUNT(*), 2) AS avg_price
FROM gamelog_raw.v_presto_log_payrecharge
WHERE game_id = {game_id}
  AND ds BETWEEN '{analysis_start}' AND '{analysis_end}'
  {server_filter}
GROUP BY pay_itemid, pay_type
ORDER BY pay_amount DESC
LIMIT 50

columns.avg_diamonds_per_payer: 付费用户人均充值钻石

paid_engagement.name: 付费玩家玩法参与
paid_engagement.sql:
WITH paid AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT role_id
  FROM gamelog_raw.v_presto_log_payrecharge
  WHERE game_id = {game_id}
    AND ds BETWEEN '{analysis_start}' AND '{analysis_end}'
    {server_filter}
),
behavior AS (
  SELECT b_id, role_id
  FROM gamelog_raw.v_presto_log_bhbehavior
  WHERE game_id = {game_id}
    AND ds BETWEEN '{analysis_start}' AND '{analysis_end}'
    {server_filter}
)
SELECT
  b.b_id AS b_id,
  COUNT(DISTINCT b.role_id) AS active_users,
  COUNT(*) AS active_events,
  ROUND(CAST(COUNT(*) AS DOUBLE) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT b.role_id), 0), 1) AS active_avg,
  COUNT(DISTINCT p.role_id) AS paid_users,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE p.role_id IS NOT NULL) AS paid_events,
  ROUND(CAST(COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE p.role_id IS NOT NULL) AS DOUBLE) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT p.role_id), 0), 1) AS paid_avg,
  ROUND(CAST(COUNT(DISTINCT p.role_id) AS DOUBLE) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT b.role_id), 0) * 100, 2) AS paid_rate
FROM behavior b
LEFT JOIN paid p ON b.role_id = p.role_id
GROUP BY b.b_id
ORDER BY active_events DESC
LIMIT 50

columns.avg_diamonds_per_payer: 付费用户人均充值钻石

silent_behavior.name: 沉默玩家现状
silent_behavior.sql:
WITH paid AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT role_id
  FROM gamelog_raw.v_presto_log_payrecharge
  WHERE game_id = {game_id}
    AND ds BETWEEN '{analysis_start}' AND '{analysis_end}'
    {server_filter}
),
silent AS (
  SELECT role_id, MAX(ds) AS last_pay_ds, SUM(CAST(pay_money AS DOUBLE)) AS silent_pay_amount, COUNT(*) AS silent_pay_times
  FROM gamelog_raw.v_presto_log_payrecharge
  WHERE game_id = {game_id}
    AND ds BETWEEN '{silent_start}' AND '{silent_end}'
    {server_filter}
  GROUP BY role_id
),
silent_active AS (
  SELECT s.role_id,
         s.silent_pay_amount
  FROM silent s
  LEFT JOIN paid p ON s.role_id = p.role_id
  WHERE p.role_id IS NULL
),
behavior AS (
  SELECT b_id, role_id
  FROM gamelog_raw.v_presto_log_bhbehavior
  WHERE game_id = {game_id}
    AND ds BETWEEN '{analysis_start}' AND '{analysis_end}'
    {server_filter}
)
SELECT
  b.b_id AS b_id,
  COUNT(DISTINCT sa.role_id) AS silent_users,
  COUNT(b.role_id) AS total_events,
  ROUND(CAST(COUNT(b.role_id) AS DOUBLE) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT sa.role_id), 0), 1) AS avg_per_user,
  ROUND(CAST(COUNT(DISTINCT sa.role_id) AS DOUBLE) / NULLIF((SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT role_id) FROM silent_active), 0) * 100, 2) AS participation_rate
FROM silent_active sa
LEFT JOIN behavior b ON sa.role_id = b.role_id
GROUP BY b.b_id
ORDER BY silent_users DESC NULLS LAST
LIMIT 50

columns.avg_diamonds_per_payer: 付费用户人均充值钻石

free_behavior.name: 免费玩家行为
free_behavior.sql:
WITH paid AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT role_id
  FROM gamelog_raw.v_presto_log_payrecharge
  WHERE game_id = {game_id}
    AND ds BETWEEN '{analysis_start}' AND '{analysis_end}'
    {server_filter}
),
silent AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT role_id
  FROM gamelog_raw.v_presto_log_payrecharge
  WHERE game_id = {game_id}
    AND ds BETWEEN '{silent_start}' AND '{silent_end}'
    {server_filter}
),
active AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT role_id
  FROM gamelog_raw.v_presto_log_rolelogin
  WHERE game_id = {game_id}
    AND ds BETWEEN '{analysis_start}' AND '{analysis_end}'
    {server_filter}
),
login_info AS (
  SELECT role_id,
         max_by(role_level, ds) AS role_level,
         max_by(role_vip, ds) AS role_vip
  FROM gamelog_raw.v_presto_log_rolelogin
  WHERE game_id = {game_id}
    AND ds BETWEEN '{analysis_start}' AND '{analysis_end}'
    {server_filter}
  GROUP BY role_id
),
free_roles AS (
  SELECT a.role_id
  FROM active a
  LEFT JOIN paid p ON a.role_id = p.role_id
  LEFT JOIN silent s ON a.role_id = s.role_id
  WHERE p.role_id IS NULL AND s.role_id IS NULL
),
behavior AS (
  SELECT b_id, role_id
  FROM gamelog_raw.v_presto_log_bhbehavior
  WHERE game_id = {game_id}
    AND ds BETWEEN '{analysis_start}' AND '{analysis_end}'
    {server_filter}
),
login_days AS (
  SELECT role_id, COUNT(DISTINCT ds) AS active_days
  FROM gamelog_raw.v_presto_log_rolelogin
  WHERE game_id = {game_id}
    AND ds BETWEEN '{analysis_start}' AND '{analysis_end}'
    {server_filter}
    AND role_id IN (SELECT role_id FROM free_roles)
  GROUP BY role_id
)
SELECT
  b.b_id AS b_id,
  COUNT(DISTINCT fr.role_id) AS users,
  COUNT(b.role_id) AS total_events,
  ROUND(CAST(COUNT(b.role_id) AS DOUBLE) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT fr.role_id), 0), 1) AS avg_per_user,
  ROUND(CAST(COUNT(DISTINCT fr.role_id) AS DOUBLE) / NULLIF((SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT role_id) FROM free_roles), 0) * 100, 2) AS participation_rate,
  COALESCE(CAST(AVG(ld.active_days) AS DECIMAL(18,1)), 0) AS avg_active_days,
  COALESCE(CAST(AVG(li.role_level) AS DECIMAL(18,0)), 0) AS avg_level,
  COALESCE(CAST(AVG(li.role_vip) AS DECIMAL(18,0)), 0) AS avg_vip
FROM free_roles fr
LEFT JOIN behavior b ON fr.role_id = b.role_id
LEFT JOIN login_days ld ON fr.role_id = ld.role_id
LEFT JOIN login_info li ON fr.role_id = li.role_id
GROUP BY b.b_id
ORDER BY users DESC NULLS LAST
LIMIT 50

columns.avg_diamonds_per_payer: 付费用户人均充值钻石

top_detail.name: Top明细
top_detail.sql:
WITH paid AS (
  SELECT role_id, SUM(CAST(pay_money AS DOUBLE)) AS pay_amount, COUNT(*) AS pay_times
  FROM gamelog_raw.v_presto_log_payrecharge
  WHERE game_id = {game_id}
    AND ds BETWEEN '{analysis_start}' AND '{analysis_end}'
    {server_filter}
  GROUP BY role_id
),
silent AS (
  SELECT role_id, SUM(CAST(pay_money AS DOUBLE)) AS silent_pay_amount,
         COUNT(*) AS silent_pay_times, MAX(ds) AS last_pay_ds
  FROM gamelog_raw.v_presto_log_payrecharge
  WHERE game_id = {game_id}
    AND ds BETWEEN '{silent_start}' AND '{silent_end}'
    {server_filter}
  GROUP BY role_id
),
login_info AS (
  SELECT role_id,
         max_by(role_level, ds) AS role_level,
         max_by(role_vip, ds) AS role_vip
  FROM gamelog_raw.v_presto_log_rolelogin
  WHERE game_id = {game_id}
    AND ds BETWEEN '{analysis_start}' AND '{analysis_end}'
    {server_filter}
  GROUP BY role_id
),
login_days AS (
  SELECT role_id, COUNT(DISTINCT ds) AS active_days
  FROM gamelog_raw.v_presto_log_rolelogin
  WHERE game_id = {game_id}
    AND ds BETWEEN '{analysis_start}' AND '{analysis_end}'
    {server_filter}
  GROUP BY role_id
),
paid_top AS (
  SELECT '付费玩家' AS segment, p.role_id,
         li.role_level, li.role_vip,
         COALESCE(CAST(p.pay_amount AS DECIMAL(18,2)), 0) AS window_pay_amount,
         p.pay_times,
         ld.active_days,
         ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY p.pay_amount DESC) AS rk
  FROM paid p
  LEFT JOIN login_info li ON p.role_id = li.role_id
  LEFT JOIN login_days ld ON p.role_id = ld.role_id
),
silent_top AS (
  SELECT '沉默玩家' AS segment, s.role_id,
         li.role_level, li.role_vip,
         COALESCE(CAST(s.silent_pay_amount AS DECIMAL(18,2)), 0) AS window_pay_amount,
         s.silent_pay_times AS pay_times,
         ld.active_days,
         ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY s.silent_pay_amount DESC, s.last_pay_ds ASC) AS rk
  FROM silent s
  LEFT JOIN paid p ON s.role_id = p.role_id
  LEFT JOIN login_info li ON s.role_id = li.role_id
  LEFT JOIN login_days ld ON s.role_id = ld.role_id
  WHERE p.role_id IS NULL
),
free_top AS (
  SELECT '免费玩家' AS segment, fr.role_id,
         li.role_level, li.role_vip,
         0 AS window_pay_amount,
         0 AS pay_times,
         ld.active_days,
         ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY ld.active_days DESC, li.role_level DESC NULLS LAST) AS rk
  FROM (
    SELECT DISTINCT role_id
    FROM gamelog_raw.v_presto_log_rolelogin
    WHERE game_id = {game_id}
      AND ds BETWEEN '{analysis_start}' AND '{analysis_end}'
      {server_filter}
  ) fr
  LEFT JOIN paid p ON fr.role_id = p.role_id
  LEFT JOIN silent s ON fr.role_id = s.role_id
  LEFT JOIN login_info li ON fr.role_id = li.role_id
  LEFT JOIN login_days ld ON fr.role_id = ld.role_id
  WHERE p.role_id IS NULL AND s.role_id IS NULL
)
SELECT segment, role_id, role_level, role_vip, window_pay_amount, pay_times, active_days
FROM paid_top WHERE rk <= {top_n}
UNION ALL
SELECT segment, role_id, role_level, role_vip, window_pay_amount, pay_times, active_days
FROM silent_top WHERE rk <= {top_n}
UNION ALL
SELECT segment, role_id, role_level, role_vip, window_pay_amount, pay_times, active_days
FROM free_top WHERE rk <= {top_n}
ORDER BY segment, window_pay_amount DESC

overview.name: 概览
overview.sql:
WITH active AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT iuid
  FROM raw_scribe_log.login
  WHERE gameid = '39'
    AND ds BETWEEN '{analysis_start}' AND '{analysis_end}'
),
paid AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT iuid
  FROM raw_scribe_log.pay
  WHERE gameid = '39'
    AND ds BETWEEN '{analysis_start}' AND '{analysis_end}'
),
silent AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT iuid
  FROM raw_scribe_log.pay
  WHERE gameid = '39'
    AND ds BETWEEN '{silent_start}' AND '{silent_end}'
),
pay_analysis AS (
  SELECT iuid,
         SUM(CAST(custom_pra3 AS BIGINT)) AS pay_diamonds,
         ROUND(SUM(CAST(custom_pra3 AS DOUBLE)) / 100, 2) AS pay_usd,
         COUNT(*) AS pay_times
  FROM raw_scribe_log.pay
  WHERE gameid = '39'
    AND ds BETWEEN '{analysis_start}' AND '{analysis_end}'
  GROUP BY iuid
)
SELECT
  CASE
    WHEN p.iuid IS NOT NULL THEN '付费玩家'
    WHEN s.iuid IS NOT NULL THEN '沉默玩家'
    ELSE '免费玩家'
  END AS segment,
  COUNT(DISTINCT a.iuid) AS user_count,
  COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN pa.iuid IS NOT NULL THEN a.iuid END) AS payer_count,
  COALESCE(CAST(SUM(pa.pay_diamonds) AS DECIMAL(18,0)), 0) AS pay_diamonds,
  COALESCE(CAST(SUM(pa.pay_usd) AS DECIMAL(18,2)), 0) AS pay_usd,
  COALESCE(SUM(pa.pay_times), 0) AS pay_times,
  CASE WHEN COUNT(DISTINCT a.iuid) > 0
       THEN ROUND(COALESCE(CAST(SUM(pa.pay_diamonds) AS DOUBLE), 0) / COUNT(DISTINCT a.iuid), 2)
       ELSE 0 END AS avg_diamonds_per_user,
  CASE WHEN COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN pa.iuid IS NOT NULL THEN a.iuid END) > 0
       THEN ROUND(COALESCE(CAST(SUM(pa.pay_diamonds) AS DOUBLE), 0) / COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN pa.iuid IS NOT NULL THEN a.iuid END), 2)
       ELSE 0 END AS avg_diamonds_per_payer,
  CASE WHEN COUNT(DISTINCT a.iuid) > 0
       THEN ROUND(COALESCE(CAST(SUM(pa.pay_usd) AS DOUBLE), 0) / COUNT(DISTINCT a.iuid), 2)
       ELSE 0 END AS avg_usd_per_user,
  CASE WHEN COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN pa.iuid IS NOT NULL THEN a.iuid END) > 0
       THEN ROUND(COALESCE(CAST(SUM(pa.pay_usd) AS DOUBLE), 0) / COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN pa.iuid IS NOT NULL THEN a.iuid END), 2)
       ELSE 0 END AS avg_usd_per_payer
FROM active a
LEFT JOIN paid p ON a.iuid = p.iuid
LEFT JOIN silent s ON a.iuid = s.iuid
LEFT JOIN pay_analysis pa ON a.iuid = pa.iuid
GROUP BY CASE
  WHEN p.iuid IS NOT NULL THEN '付费玩家'
  WHEN s.iuid IS NOT NULL THEN '沉默玩家'
  ELSE '免费玩家'
END
ORDER BY CASE
  WHEN segment = '付费玩家' THEN 1
  WHEN segment = '沉默玩家' THEN 2
  ELSE 3
END

columns.avg_diamonds_per_payer: 付费用户人均充值钻石
columns.avg_usd_per_payer: 付费用户人均付费（美元）

paid_recharge.name: 付费玩家付费点
paid_recharge.sql:
SELECT
  CASE custom_pra1 WHEN '1' THEN '兑换游戏币' WHEN '2' THEN '直购道具' ELSE custom_pra1 END AS pay_type_name,
  COALESCE(custom_pra5, '') AS gift_id,
  COUNT(DISTINCT iuid) AS payer_count,
  COUNT(*) AS pay_times,
  COALESCE(CAST(SUM(CAST(custom_pra3 AS BIGINT)) AS DECIMAL(18,0)), 0) AS pay_diamonds,
  COALESCE(CAST(SUM(CAST(custom_pra3 AS DOUBLE)) / 100 AS DECIMAL(18,2)), 0) AS pay_usd,
  ROUND(COALESCE(CAST(SUM(CAST(custom_pra3 AS BIGINT)) AS DOUBLE), 0) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0), 0) AS avg_price_diamonds,
  ROUND(COALESCE(CAST(SUM(CAST(custom_pra3 AS DOUBLE)) / 100 AS DOUBLE), 0) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0), 2) AS avg_price_usd
FROM raw_scribe_log.pay
WHERE gameid = '39'
  AND ds BETWEEN '{analysis_start}' AND '{analysis_end}'
GROUP BY CASE custom_pra1 WHEN '1' THEN '兑换游戏币' WHEN '2' THEN '直购道具' ELSE custom_pra1 END,
           COALESCE(custom_pra5, '')
ORDER BY pay_diamonds DESC
LIMIT 50

columns.avg_diamonds_per_payer: 付费用户人均充值钻石

paid_engagement.name: 付费玩家玩法参与
paid_engagement.sql:
WITH paid AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT iuid
  FROM raw_scribe_log.pay
  WHERE gameid = '39'
    AND ds BETWEEN '{analysis_start}' AND '{analysis_end}'
),
active AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT iuid
  FROM raw_scribe_log.login
  WHERE gameid = '39'
    AND ds BETWEEN '{analysis_start}' AND '{analysis_end}'
),
prop_all AS (
  SELECT custom_pra1 AS system_method, iuid,
         COUNT(*) AS events,
         SUM(CAST(custom_pra3 AS BIGINT)) AS cost
  FROM raw_scribe_log.prop
  WHERE gameid = '39'
    AND ds BETWEEN '{analysis_start}' AND '{analysis_end}'
  GROUP BY custom_pra1, iuid
),
prop_paid AS (
  SELECT system_method, iuid, events, cost
  FROM prop_all
  WHERE iuid IN (SELECT iuid FROM paid)
)
SELECT
  pa.system_method AS system_method,
  COUNT(DISTINCT pa.iuid) AS active_consumers,
  SUM(pa.events) AS active_events,
  SUM(pa.cost) AS active_cost,
  ROUND(CAST(SUM(pa.events) AS DOUBLE) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT pa.iuid), 0), 1) AS active_avg,
  COUNT(DISTINCT pp.iuid) AS paid_consumers,
  SUM(pp.events) AS paid_events,
  SUM(pp.cost) AS paid_cost,
  ROUND(CAST(COUNT(DISTINCT pp.iuid) AS DOUBLE) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT pa.iuid), 0) * 100, 2) AS paid_rate
FROM prop_all pa
LEFT JOIN prop_paid pp ON pa.system_method = pp.system_method AND pa.iuid = pp.iuid
GROUP BY pa.system_method
ORDER BY active_cost DESC NULLS LAST
LIMIT 50

columns.avg_diamonds_per_payer: 付费用户人均充值钻石

silent_behavior.name: 沉默玩家现状
silent_behavior.sql:
WITH paid AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT iuid
  FROM raw_scribe_log.pay
  WHERE gameid = '39'
    AND ds BETWEEN '{analysis_start}' AND '{analysis_end}'
),
silent AS (
  SELECT iuid, MAX(ds) AS last_pay_ds,
         SUM(CAST(custom_pra3 AS BIGINT)) AS silent_pay_diamonds,
         ROUND(SUM(CAST(custom_pra3 AS DOUBLE)) / 100, 2) AS silent_pay_usd,
         COUNT(*) AS silent_pay_times
  FROM raw_scribe_log.pay
  WHERE gameid = '39'
    AND ds BETWEEN '{silent_start}' AND '{silent_end}'
  GROUP BY iuid
),
login_info AS (
  SELECT iuid, user_level, vip_level
  FROM (
    SELECT iuid, user_level, vip_level,
           row_number() OVER (PARTITION BY iuid ORDER BY ds DESC, timestamp DESC) AS rn
    FROM raw_scribe_log.login
    WHERE gameid = '39'
      AND ds BETWEEN '{analysis_start}' AND '{analysis_end}'
  ) WHERE rn = 1
),
prop AS (
  SELECT iuid, custom_pra1 AS system_method, COUNT(*) AS events,
         SUM(CAST(custom_pra3 AS BIGINT)) AS cost
  FROM raw_scribe_log.prop
  WHERE gameid = '39'
    AND ds BETWEEN '{analysis_start}' AND '{analysis_end}'
  GROUP BY iuid, custom_pra1
),
silent_active AS (
  SELECT s.iuid,
         s.last_pay_ds,
         s.silent_pay_diamonds,
         s.silent_pay_usd,
         s.silent_pay_times,
         li.user_level,
         li.vip_level
  FROM silent s
  LEFT JOIN paid p ON s.iuid = p.iuid
  LEFT JOIN login_info li ON s.iuid = li.iuid
  WHERE p.iuid IS NULL
)
SELECT
  p.system_method AS system_method,
  COUNT(DISTINCT sa.iuid) AS silent_users,
  SUM(p.events) AS total_events,
  SUM(p.cost) AS total_cost,
  ROUND(CAST(SUM(p.events) AS DOUBLE) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT sa.iuid), 0), 1) AS avg_per_user,
  ROUND(CAST(COUNT(DISTINCT sa.iuid) AS DOUBLE) / NULLIF((SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT iuid) FROM silent_active), 0) * 100, 2) AS participation_rate,
  COALESCE(CAST(AVG(sa.silent_pay_diamonds) AS DECIMAL(18,0)), 0) AS avg_silent_diamonds,
  COALESCE(CAST(AVG(sa.silent_pay_usd) AS DECIMAL(18,2)), 0) AS avg_silent_usd
FROM silent_active sa
LEFT JOIN prop p ON sa.iuid = p.iuid
GROUP BY p.system_method
ORDER BY silent_users DESC NULLS LAST
LIMIT 50

columns.avg_diamonds_per_payer: 付费用户人均充值钻石

free_behavior.name: 免费玩家行为
free_behavior.sql:
WITH paid AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT iuid
  FROM raw_scribe_log.pay
  WHERE gameid = '39'
    AND ds BETWEEN '{analysis_start}' AND '{analysis_end}'
),
silent AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT iuid
  FROM raw_scribe_log.pay
  WHERE gameid = '39'
    AND ds BETWEEN '{silent_start}' AND '{silent_end}'
),
active AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT iuid
  FROM raw_scribe_log.login
  WHERE gameid = '39'
    AND ds BETWEEN '{analysis_start}' AND '{analysis_end}'
),
login_info AS (
  SELECT iuid, user_level, vip_level
  FROM (
    SELECT iuid, user_level, vip_level,
           row_number() OVER (PARTITION BY iuid ORDER BY ds DESC, timestamp DESC) AS rn
    FROM raw_scribe_log.login
    WHERE gameid = '39'
      AND ds BETWEEN '{analysis_start}' AND '{analysis_end}'
  ) WHERE rn = 1
),
free_roles AS (
  SELECT a.iuid
  FROM active a
  LEFT JOIN paid p ON a.iuid = p.iuid
  LEFT JOIN silent s ON a.iuid = s.iuid
  WHERE p.iuid IS NULL AND s.iuid IS NULL
),
prop AS (
  SELECT iuid, custom_pra1 AS system_method, COUNT(*) AS events,
         SUM(CAST(custom_pra3 AS BIGINT)) AS cost
  FROM raw_scribe_log.prop
  WHERE gameid = '39'
    AND ds BETWEEN '{analysis_start}' AND '{analysis_end}'
  GROUP BY iuid, custom_pra1
),
login_days AS (
  SELECT iuid, COUNT(DISTINCT ds) AS active_days
  FROM raw_scribe_log.login
  WHERE gameid = '39'
    AND ds BETWEEN '{analysis_start}' AND '{analysis_end}'
    AND iuid IN (SELECT iuid FROM free_roles)
  GROUP BY iuid
)
SELECT
  p.system_method AS system_method,
  COUNT(DISTINCT fr.iuid) AS users,
  SUM(p.events) AS total_events,
  SUM(p.cost) AS total_cost,
  ROUND(CAST(SUM(p.events) AS DOUBLE) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT fr.iuid), 0), 1) AS avg_per_user,
  ROUND(CAST(COUNT(DISTINCT fr.iuid) AS DOUBLE) / NULLIF((SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT iuid) FROM free_roles), 0) * 100, 2) AS participation_rate,
  COALESCE(CAST(AVG(ld.active_days) AS DECIMAL(18,1)), 0) AS avg_active_days,
  COALESCE(CAST(AVG(CAST(li.user_level AS BIGINT)) AS DECIMAL(18,0)), 0) AS avg_level,
  COALESCE(CAST(AVG(CAST(li.vip_level AS BIGINT)) AS DECIMAL(18,0)), 0) AS avg_vip
FROM free_roles fr
LEFT JOIN prop p ON fr.iuid = p.iuid
LEFT JOIN login_days ld ON fr.iuid = ld.iuid
LEFT JOIN login_info li ON fr.iuid = li.iuid
GROUP BY p.system_method
ORDER BY users DESC NULLS LAST
LIMIT 50

columns.avg_diamonds_per_payer: 付费用户人均充值钻石

top_detail.name: Top明细
top_detail.sql:
WITH paid AS (
  SELECT iuid, SUM(CAST(custom_pra3 AS BIGINT)) AS pay_diamonds, ROUND(SUM(CAST(custom_pra3 AS DOUBLE)) / 100, 2) AS pay_usd, COUNT(*) AS pay_times
  FROM raw_scribe_log.pay
  WHERE gameid = '39'
    AND ds BETWEEN '{analysis_start}' AND '{analysis_end}'
  GROUP BY iuid
),
silent AS (
  SELECT iuid, SUM(CAST(custom_pra3 AS BIGINT)) AS silent_pay_diamonds,
         ROUND(SUM(CAST(custom_pra3 AS DOUBLE)) / 100, 2) AS silent_pay_usd,
         COUNT(*) AS silent_pay_times, MAX(ds) AS last_pay_ds
  FROM raw_scribe_log.pay
  WHERE gameid = '39'
    AND ds BETWEEN '{silent_start}' AND '{silent_end}'
  GROUP BY iuid
),
login_info AS (
  SELECT iuid, user_level, vip_level
  FROM (
    SELECT iuid, user_level, vip_level,
           row_number() OVER (PARTITION BY iuid ORDER BY ds DESC, timestamp DESC) AS rn
    FROM raw_scribe_log.login
    WHERE gameid = '39'
      AND ds BETWEEN '{analysis_start}' AND '{analysis_end}'
  ) WHERE rn = 1
),
login_days AS (
  SELECT iuid, COUNT(DISTINCT ds) AS active_days
  FROM raw_scribe_log.login
  WHERE gameid = '39'
    AND ds BETWEEN '{analysis_start}' AND '{analysis_end}'
  GROUP BY iuid
),
paid_top AS (
  SELECT '付费玩家' AS segment, p.iuid,
         li.user_level, li.vip_level,
         COALESCE(CAST(p.pay_usd AS DECIMAL(18,2)), 0) AS window_pay_amount,
         p.pay_times,
         ld.active_days,
         ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY p.pay_usd DESC) AS rk
  FROM paid p
  LEFT JOIN login_info li ON p.iuid = li.iuid
  LEFT JOIN login_days ld ON p.iuid = ld.iuid
),
silent_top AS (
  SELECT '沉默玩家' AS segment, s.iuid,
         li.user_level, li.vip_level,
         COALESCE(CAST(s.silent_pay_usd AS DECIMAL(18,2)), 0) AS window_pay_amount,
         s.silent_pay_times AS pay_times,
         ld.active_days,
         ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY s.silent_pay_usd DESC, s.last_pay_ds ASC) AS rk
  FROM silent s
  LEFT JOIN paid p ON s.iuid = p.iuid
  LEFT JOIN login_info li ON s.iuid = li.iuid
  LEFT JOIN login_days ld ON s.iuid = ld.iuid
  WHERE p.iuid IS NULL
),
free_top AS (
  SELECT '免费玩家' AS segment, fr.iuid,
         li.user_level, li.vip_level,
         0 AS window_pay_amount,
         0 AS pay_times,
         ld.active_days,
         ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY ld.active_days DESC, CAST(li.user_level AS BIGINT) DESC NULLS LAST) AS rk
  FROM (
    SELECT DISTINCT iuid
    FROM raw_scribe_log.login
    WHERE gameid = '39'
      AND ds BETWEEN '{analysis_start}' AND '{analysis_end}'
  ) fr
  LEFT JOIN paid p ON fr.iuid = p.iuid
  LEFT JOIN silent s ON fr.iuid = s.iuid
  LEFT JOIN login_info li ON fr.iuid = li.iuid
  LEFT JOIN login_days ld ON fr.iuid = ld.iuid
  WHERE p.iuid IS NULL AND s.iuid IS NULL
)
SELECT segment, iuid, user_level, vip_level, window_pay_amount, pay_times, active_days
FROM paid_top WHERE rk <= {top_n}
UNION ALL
SELECT segment, iuid, user_level, vip_level, window_pay_amount, pay_times, active_days
FROM silent_top WHERE rk <= {top_n}
UNION ALL
SELECT segment, iuid, user_level, vip_level, window_pay_amount, pay_times, active_days
FROM free_top WHERE rk <= {top_n}
ORDER BY segment, window_pay_amount DESC
